title: Anchor Open Questions
summary: Tracker of resolved decisions and open recommendations gating Anchor's MVP architecture, scope, infrastructure, memory, compliance, and monetization.
notes: Decision-tracking document (OQ-* items tagged Decision/Recommendation), not a single locked ADR. Many items defer to ADRs (0003/0006/0020/0021); some remain open (BLOCKS SHIP). Classified DOC as it provides context and references rather than authoritative locked decisions or formal requirements. Could compete with PRD/ADR aggregation, resolved to DOC because no formal user stories, acceptance criteria, or single-decision ADR structure is present.
